  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AbsoluteValuePriceAlert
    Warn if a security exceeds a lower or upper threshold.invalid input: '<'\br> Can only used on the security level.
    ExpressionAlert
    Configuration for a custom EvalEx expression alert (security level only).
    HoldingGainLosePercentAlert
    Alert when a certain position in a portfolio gains or loses a certain percentage and/or crosses an absolute price threshold.
    MaCrossingAlert
    Configuration for a moving-average crossing alert (security level only).
    PeriodPriceGainLosePercentAlert
    Alert when a security gains or loses a certain percentage in a certain days period.
    RsiThresholdAlert
    Configuration for an RSI (Relative Strength Index) threshold alert (security level only).
